data.content: Needs changes: the initial dispatch wrapper is step-aware, but the single-beat take-loop path still injects an unconditional implementation preamble at src/lib/terminal-manager.ts:798 and returns it from buildNextTakePrompt() at src/lib/terminal-manager.ts:990. That means review-step iterations can still receive contradictory write instructions. Validation: bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint (passes with existing warnings), bunx tsc --noEmit, and targeted vitest suites passed.
